## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- The user need / pain point. Lead with the WHY before the HOW. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- One-paragraph sketch. Doesn't have to be the final answer. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem. -->

## Who would benefit?

<!-- Personal use / small team / large workspace? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, screenshots, links to similar implementations in other
tools (Notion, AnyType, Obsidian, AppFlowy …). -->
